titleStmt.title: SII 41.498: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 498. (A.R. No. 711 of 1905.) Paḻani, Paḻani Taluk, Madurai District. On the north wall of the Periyāvuḍaiyār temple near Paḻani.

p.hi: Vīrakēraḷa Adhirāja Rājarājadeva, Year 40 = c. 11th century A.D.

summary.p: Mutilated. Refers to the sale of land by the ūrār of Chatturukāla-nallūr in Vaiyāvi-nāḍu to a Veḷḷāḷa called Vīranārāyanan alias Mūlabalattu-paḍai-vaḷantāṉ alias Chembiyaṉ Kāmiṇḍaṉ, a resident of Kōtaimaṅgalam alias Maḍigai-taḷam. The land is meant for conducting the Māsi-magam festival. The latter is also said to have built the verandah hall in the temple of Tiruvarāl-paramēśvarar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirakeraḷa Adhirājarā[ja*] tevaṟkut tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellā niṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu 22 Āvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu vaiyāvi nāṭṭu brahma
nallūr Ūrom tiṭṭiṭṭuk koṭutta paricāvatu . tiruvarāl parameśvarar koyillil tiruccuṟṟumāḷikai Āyiravar taṟmamākac cevikkiṟa kotaimaṅkalamānamaṭikaiṭṭaḷattirukkum veḷḷāḷan viranārayannāna mulapalattu paṭaivaḷavanṉāṉa cempiyaṉ kāmiṇṭaṉāṉa
�ka viṭaṅkappiccaṉ pakkal catturukālanallūr Ūrom koṇṭa poṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañce kālum Ivvāṭṭai māci makāmakattiṉāḷ Ip poṉ Oṉpatiṉ kaḻañce kālum Āḷuṭaiyār koyillil ciri māyecuvarar kaiyil ttuk ko
māṉa kummai ṉilam A ṅkiruta meruvāykkiḻaṉaiyiṉ vāyt to k koṭṭaip puḷikkāṭeṟukavaṟkīḻ teṉaiṉtaviṭaṉāṉa ceṉāma nāṭṭuc ceṭṭi nelvitai kalamum piramacoḻamakkavāyk kiḻ cāttaṉeṟāṉāṉa Aticaiya coḻat tamiḻaveḷān Uḻiccilpoḻikalamum
vanāna kāliṅkarāyan Āṟumā vaṭṭamtaṭi nel nelvitai kalam Itanuḷ Iru tūṇiyum paḷḷakkavarkkiḻ pottikaṇṭan Āṟumā vaṭṭam Onṟiṉāl nelvitai kalane tūṇippatakkil kalamum Āka nelvitai mukkalane Irutūṇiyum mācimakaṅkaḻitta yiṟṟaināḷ pūcattirunāḷ Innilam mukkalane Irutūṇiyum vi
ka viṟṟu vilaiceytu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom catturukāla nallūrom tiruvirāṟp paramecuvararkku In nilattāl vanta kaṭamaiyu mañcāṭiyu miṟuttu muṟṟūṭṭu Uṇpārākavum nilakkalappu nīrkkalappu koḷḷappeṟātākavum Inilam muṭṭumuṭṭum tevarkku
Digital edition of SII 41.498 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
